creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
> I actually need to update the phab as I have 2.46 built successfully for a few weeks now, but not runtime tested. It will continue to use GCC.

An update would be greatly appreciated! In this case, i can try to build my www/nyxt port against it and runtime test this one :)

But I did not get, why we can't create a second port for the new version and switch ports depending on them after a good test. Now we need to test everything depending on it, instead of focusing on single ports and then switching dependencies step by stepö
